title: Savory Middle Eastern Skirt Steak Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and indulgent dish featuring tender skirt steak in a savory sauce with bhuna spices, served as an evening meal.
instructions: Pat the steak dry with paper towels and season both sides lightly with salt and black pepper.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil, swirl it around and add seasoned steak slices in single layer without overcrowding the pan.
Cook for about 2 minutes per side until seared. Remove from pan and place on a plate.
Reduce heat to medium and add chopped onion and bell pepper into the skillet. Cook for about 5-7 minutes until softened, stirring occasionally.
Add minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute until fragrant.

Pour in chicken or vegetable broth, cumin, salt, black pepper, lemon juice, and fresh parsley (if using). Stir well and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for about 10 minutes while cooking the steak again by grilling or pan-frying until thoroughly cooked.
Slice the seared steak against the grain and serve over the vegetable mixture. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
